title: bihai rutila
intro: Bihai rutila, also known as Bidens pilosa, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. It is native to Asia and Australia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties. The bihai rutila plant is known for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of bihai rutila can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
